settings.quote: This leather tools like butter. Been using Hermann Oak for 15 years, switching to TSF permanently.
settings.author: Jake R.

settings.quote: Incredible flex and strength. My customers immediately noticed the difference on the newly crafted saddles.
settings.author: Marcus W.

settings.quote: The fact that it ships same day from Texas is a gamechanger. I get my sides within 48 hours for a fraction of the price of W&C.
settings.author: David L.

settings.quote: Premium Argentine veg-tan that simply behaves perfectly. Absolutely unmatched value.
settings.author: Sarah H.

settings.quote: If you make saddles, you owe it to yourself to try TSF. Excellent customer service and unmatched quality.
settings.author: Tom B.
